commands.review_summary:
The PR changes CLI Gateway connection details to target tailnet/custom bind hosts and adds an auth hint for reasonless Gateway close errors.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection and current tests. With gateway.bind="tailnet", TLS disabled, and a discovered 100.64.0.1 address, this branch builds a plaintext non-loopback ws:// target that current Gateway URL policy rejects by default.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer judgment is needed to choose the Gateway locality/auth direction, and the external contributor still needs to provide real after-fix behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix(cli): resolve gateway host from bind mode and surface auth hint on silent disconnect
